change_summary: Bundled idempotent forge-init.sh script and referenced it near the top of SKILL.md.

files_changed.purpose: Idempotent workspace initializer: creates .vf/config.json (with evidence_retention_days=30), .vf/state/, .vf/benchmarks/, e2e-evidence/.gitkeep, updates .gitignore, copies .claude/rules/*.md.
Added Automated setup line under heading pointing at forge-init.sh.

notes: Script sources rules from repo-root/.claude/rules (validationforge repo ships 3 .md rule files); script warns but does not fail if rules source or target .gitignore is missing. Config schema trimmed to essentials (version, enforcement, evidence_dir, evidence_retention_days, max_fix_attempts, created_at) — platform detection still belongs to the skill's manual Phase 1.
